snapshot.active_constraints: C++17 standard, Ninja/LLVM pipeline, PowerShell syntax lock.
snapshot.key_knowledge: - OrchestratorTest project verified and documented. - Toolchain: clang-cl, lld-link, ninja. - Output: "Orchestrator Test Successful".
